title: GRP Tanks
name: GRP Tanks
description: Industrial-grade Glass Reinforced Plastic (GRP) tanks for high-capacity storage. These tanks are preferred for their immunity to corrosion, structural rigidity, and versatility in both above-ground and underground installations.
features: Ideal for fire-water and potable storage
Low maintenance and long service life
process: Precise alignment of structural glass fibers

title: PVC Tanks
name: PVC Tanks
description: PVC (Polyvinyl Chloride) tanks specifically designed for high-purity and chemical-resistant storage. Recognized for their smooth internal finish and excellent resistance to a wide range of aggressive chemicals and acids.
features: Suitable for laboratories and pharma sites
process: Precision PVC sheet preparation and cutting
Advanced thermal welding of all joints

title: Diesel Tanks
name: Diesel Tanks
description: Safe and compliant diesel storage solutions for industrial and commercial use. Our tanks are designed to prevent leaks and environmental contamination, ensuring secure storage for fuel and oil.
features: Available in horizontal and vertical configurations
process: Structural design for fuel weight and pressure
Fitting of specialized fuel valves and level gauges

title: Fiber Water Tanks
name: Fiber Water Tanks
description: High-durability fiberglass reinforced plastic (FRP) water tanks designed for extreme UAE weather conditions. These tanks are corrosion-resistant, lightweight, and offer superior structural strength for residential and commercial use.
features: Available in various vertical and horizontal shapes

title: Panel Tanks
name: Panel Tanks
description: Modular GRP panel tanks for large-scale water storage. These tanks can be assembled in various configurations to fit specific site requirements, making them ideal for high-rise buildings and industrial zones.
features: Suitable for massive capacities (up to 1,000,000 liters)

title: Poly Water Tanks
name: Poly Water Tanks
description: Rotationally molded polyethylene tanks for safe potable water storage. These tanks are food-grade, multi-layered, and provide excellent insulation against heat.

title: Box Tanks
name: Box Tanks
description: Rectangular and square GRP tanks designed for limited space applications. Perfect for lofts, basements, and mechanical rooms where space efficiency is paramount.
features: Fits in lofts and small enclosures
process: Custom mold creation for specific dimensions
